subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! The letter which thou hadst addressed to Jinab-i-Manshadi was noted. We from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ شد ما از تو
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @poems and quotation from poetry, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
